slides.title: Stand for Justice: Empowering Persecuted Christians in India.
slides.subtitle: Every day, innocent Christians face severe persecution. Your support provides vital legal aid, financial relief, and a voice to the voiceless.

hero.heading: Stand for Justice: Empowering Persecuted Christians in India.
hero.subheading: Every day, innocent Christians face severe persecution. Your support provides vital legal aid, financial relief, and a voice to the voiceless.

items.title: Documenting Injustice
items.description: We meticulously record incidents of persecution, building a verifiable database to expose violations and demand accountability.

items.title: Providing Legal Aid
items.description: Our network of lawyers offers crucial legal assistance to victims, helping them navigate complex legal systems and seek justice.

items.title: Offering Compassionate Support
items.description: Beyond legalities, we provide financial aid, medical assistance, and trauma counseling to those who have lost everything.

items.title: 24/7 Helpline Support
items.description: Our dedicated multi-lingual helpline provides immediate assistance, crisis intervention, and guidance to those facing persecution. We are always here to listen and respond.

items.title: Reporting & Advocacy
items.description: We publish comprehensive reports and actively advocate for religious freedom with national and international bodies. Our voice champions the rights of the persecuted.

items.title: Legal Intervention
items.description: From filing FIRs to representing cases in court, our legal team fights for justice, challenging wrongful arrests and property destructions. We stand by our brothers and sisters.

items.title: Financial & Material Aid
items.description: We provide emergency funds, food, shelter, and medical assistance to families displaced or harmed by persecution. Every contribution makes a tangible difference.

items.title: Prayer Network Activation
items.description: We mobilize a global prayer network to intercede for the persecuted, believing in the power of collective prayer for strength and divine intervention.

items.title: Awareness & Education
items.description: Through seminars, publications, and social media, we raise awareness about the plight of persecuted Christians, fostering understanding and empathy worldwide. Education is key to change.

items.name: Pastor Samuel K.
items.quote: When our church was attacked, Persecution Relief was the first to respond. They connected us with legal counsel and brought food for our families. Their quick action restored our faith in humanity.
items.title: Community Leader, Odisha

items.name: Maria Devi
items.quote: My husband was wrongfully detained. Persecution Relief fought tirelessly for his release, providing our family with financial support during the darkest time. We are forever grateful for their advocacy.
items.title: Wife of Persecuted Christian, Uttar Pradesh

items.name: Brother Elijah M.
items.quote: The team at Persecution Relief not only documented our incident but also ensured it reached international organizations. Their dedication to justice is inspiring and provides immense encouragement.
items.title: Persecution Survivor, Karnataka

sections.body: Join Persecution Relief in protecting religious freedom and providing vital aid. Every donation, every prayer, every shared story makes a profound difference.
sections.title: Your support can change lives.
Who We Are

settings.customHtml:
Who We Are

Persecution Relief is a registered nonprofit organization dedicated to reporting, documenting, and responding to religious persecution against Christians in India. Founded on the principle that every believer has the right to practice their faith without fear, we operate a 24/7 toll-free helpline (1800-1234-461) and coordinate rapid response teams across the country.

We work with local churches, legal professionals, medical teams, and government agencies to provide comprehensive support to victims and their families.

sections.customHtml:
Who We Are

Persecution Relief is a registered nonprofit organization dedicated to reporting, documenting, and responding to religious persecution against Christians in India. Founded on the principle that every believer has the right to practice their faith without fear, we operate a 24/7 toll-free helpline (1800-1234-461) and coordinate rapid response teams across the country.

We work with local churches, legal professionals, medical teams, and government agencies to provide comprehensive support to victims and their families.

sections.title: Our Founder

settings.customHtml:
Our Founder

Persecution Relief was founded by a passionate advocate for religious freedom who witnessed firsthand the suffering of persecuted believers in India. Driven by faith and a commitment to justice, the organization was established to be a voice for the voiceless and a shield for the vulnerable.

Under visionary leadership, Persecution Relief has grown from a small prayer group into a nationwide network of volunteers, lawyers, and advocates serving thousands of persecuted Christians every year.

sections.customHtml:
Our Founder

Persecution Relief was founded by a passionate advocate for religious freedom who witnessed firsthand the suffering of persecuted believers in India. Driven by faith and a commitment to justice, the organization was established to be a voice for the voiceless and a shield for the vulnerable.

Under visionary leadership, Persecution Relief has grown from a small prayer group into a nationwide network of volunteers, lawyers, and advocates serving thousands of persecuted Christians every year.

sections.title: Our Goal

settings.customHtml:
Our Goal

To create a nation where every individual can freely worship and practice their Christian faith without fear of violence, intimidation, social boycott, or legal harassment. We envision an India where religious liberty is not just a constitutional promise but a lived reality for every believer.

sections.customHtml:
Our Goal

To create a nation where every individual can freely worship and practice their Christian faith without fear of violence, intimidation, social boycott, or legal harassment. We envision an India where religious liberty is not just a constitutional promise but a lived reality for every believer.

sections.title: Our Mission

settings.customHtml:
Our Mission

To document, report, and respond to Christian persecution in India through four pillars of service: Prayer, Financial Aid, Political Advocacy, and Judicial Support. We stand with the persecuted church, providing immediate relief and long-term rehabilitation to victims and their families.

sections.customHtml:
Our Mission

To document, report, and respond to Christian persecution in India through four pillars of service: Prayer, Financial Aid, Political Advocacy, and Judicial Support. We stand with the persecuted church, providing immediate relief and long-term rehabilitation to victims and their families.

sections.title: Our Motto

settings.customHtml:
Our Motto

"Serving Persecuted, Loving Persecutors"

This motto encapsulates our belief that the Christian response to persecution must be rooted in love — love for those who suffer, and even love for those who cause the suffering. We seek justice while extending grace.

sections.customHtml:
Our Motto

"Serving Persecuted, Loving Persecutors"

This motto encapsulates our belief that the Christian response to persecution must be rooted in love — love for those who suffer, and even love for those who cause the suffering. We seek justice while extending grace.

sections.title: Our Vision

settings.customHtml:
Our Vision

To be the leading voice for persecuted Christians in India, building a comprehensive network of prayer, advocacy, legal aid, and community support that ensures no believer faces persecution alone. We envision a movement that transforms communities through compassion, justice, and the power of united prayer.

sections.customHtml:
Our Vision

To be the leading voice for persecuted Christians in India, building a comprehensive network of prayer, advocacy, legal aid, and community support that ensures no believer faces persecution alone. We envision a movement that transforms communities through compassion, justice, and the power of united prayer.

sections.title: Our Statement of Faith

settings.customHtml:
Our Statement of Faith

We believe in one God, eternally existing in three persons: Father, Son, and Holy Spirit. We believe in the divine inspiration and authority of the Holy Scriptures. We believe in the deity of our Lord Jesus Christ, His virgin birth, His sinless life, His miracles, His atoning death, His bodily resurrection, and His personal return in power and glory.

We believe that salvation is by grace through faith in Jesus Christ alone. We believe in the present ministry of the Holy Spirit by whose indwelling the Christian is enabled to live a godly life. We believe in the spiritual unity of believers in our Lord Jesus Christ.

sections.customHtml:

sections.body: At Persecution Relief, our commitment to the persecuted Christian community in India manifests through a multi-faceted approach. We don't just react to incidents; we proactively work to prevent, protect, and empower. Our model integrates reporting, relief, legal aid, advocacy, and spiritual support to provide holistic care for those facing the brunt of religious intolerance.
sections.title: Comprehensive Support for Persecuted Christians

items.title: 24/7 National Emergency Helpline
items.description: Our toll-free helpline operates around the clock, providing immediate response to distress calls from victims nationwide. This is often the first point of contact for urgent needs, providing instant relief and guidance.

items.title: Incident Documentation & Reporting
items.description: We meticulously document every reported incident, gathering evidence, testimonies, and impact assessments. These detailed reports form the basis for our advocacy and provide crucial data for understanding persecution trends.

items.title: Legal Assistance & Intervention
items.description: Through a network of dedicated lawyers, we offer pro-bono legal counsel, file First Information Reports (FIRs), represent victims in court, and challenge unjust laws. We fight for their fundamental rights.

items.title: Emergency Financial & Material Aid
items.description: For those displaced, injured, or with destroyed property, we provide emergency relief including food, shelter assistance, medical aid, and trauma counseling. This essential aid helps them rebuild their lives.

items.title: National & International Advocacy
items.description: We engage with government bodies, human rights commissions, diplomatic missions, and international organizations to raise awareness, influence policy, and seek accountability for persecutors. Our voices are amplified globally.

items.title: Media & Public Awareness Campaigns
items.description: Through our news portals, social media, and public awareness campaigns, we educate the public about the challenges faced by Christians in India. We aim to foster understanding, empathy, and support among a wider audience.

sections.body: India, a land celebrated for its diversity, is increasingly becoming a challenging place for its Christian minority. Persecution, once sporadic, has become systematic and alarmingly prevalent. From physical assaults and mob violence to false accusations and legal harassment, Christians face a spectrum of threats simply for their faith. This growing intolerance necessitates an urgent and robust response, which is why Persecution Relief was founded.
sections.title: The Unfolding Reality of Persecution in India

sections.body: Year after year, the number of reported incidents of Christian persecution in India continues to climb. Our data reflects a disturbing trend: attacks on churches, forced conversions, social boycotts, and legal battles are becoming commonplace. This environment of fear and intimidation not only violates constitutional rights to religious freedom but also shatters lives and communities. We exist to be a beacon of hope and a shield of protection in this escalating crisis. We believe that by shedding light on these dark realities, we can mobilize support and demand justice for those who are suffering.
sections.title: Facing the Facts: The Alarming Rise in Hostility

sections.body: The relentless assault on religious freedom demands a concerted effort. Persecution Relief stands in the gap, transforming reports of suffering into actionable interventions. Our mission is to ensure that every persecuted Christian has access to help, advocacy, and a community of support. We refuse to let their cries go unheard or their struggles unseen.
sections.title: Responding to Crisis: Our Call to Action

sections.body: Welcome to our News & Reports section, your source for the latest updates on Christian persecution in India and our ongoing efforts. Here you will find in-depth analysis, incident reports, success stories, and critical insights into the religious freedom landscape. Transparency and timely information are central to our advocacy.
sections.title: Staying Informed: Latest on Persecution & Advocacy

items.title: English News
items.description: Read our comprehensive news reports and press releases in English, providing global insights into the challenges faced by Christians in India.

items.title: Hindi News
items.description: Access localized news and detailed reports in Hindi, reaching a broader audience within India and Hindi-speaking communities.

items.title: Malayalam News
items.description: Stay updated with reports and news specifically tailored for Malayalam-speaking regions, an important segment of the Christian population in India.

sections.body: The battle for religious freedom and justice requires a collective effort. Your support, in any form, empowers Persecution Relief to continue our vital work for persecuted Christians in India. There are many ways you can stand with us and make a tangible difference.
sections.title: Be a Beacon of Hope: Join the Fight Against Persecution

items.title: Prayerful Support
items.description: Engage in intercessory prayer for the persecuted. Your prayers offer spiritual strength and tangible hope to those suffering. Join our global prayer network today and make a difference from wherever you are.

items.title: Financial Contribution
items.description: Your financial gifts directly fund legal aid, emergency relief, medical care, and advocacy efforts. Every rupee brings relief and sustains our operations. Your generosity fuels our mission.

items.title: Political Engagement
items.description: Learn how to engage with policymakers and write to your representatives to advocate for religious freedom and human rights in India. Your voice in the political sphere is powerful.

items.title: Judicial Activism
items.description: Support our legal team's efforts by volunteering or contributing to our legal aid fund. We challenge unjust laws and fight for justice in the courtroom.

items.title: Join Our Team
items.description: Offer your skills as a volunteer, researcher, or field worker. We need passionate individuals to expand our reach and strengthen our mission on the ground.

items.title: Spread Awareness
items.description: Share our reports, news, and calls to action on social media. Educate your community and amplify the voices of the persecuted. Awareness is the first step towards change.

sections.title: Report Persecution

settings.customHtml:
Report Persecution

If you or someone you know is facing persecution for their Christian faith in India, report it immediately.

1800-1234-461

Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. All calls are confidential.

sections.title: About Us
sections.content: I AM JESUS WHO YOU ARE PERSECUTING

settings.customHtml:
About Us

I Am Jesus Who You Are Persecuting

Our Motto

To be the voice of the voiceless and stand with those who face persecution for their faith, ensuring no cry goes unheard.

Our Mission

To document, report, and respond to persecution through prayer, financial aid, legal support, and political advocacy.

Our Goal

To create a world where every person can practice their faith freely without fear of violence, discrimination, or injustice.
